behavior: v1 oracle detects fp8 unsupported on RTX 3090; Mimir patch warns + falls back to bf16 (auto) KV; task continues and generates correctly.
pre_patch: NotImplementedError: VLLM_USE_V1=1 is not supported with --kv-cache-dtype (task killed)
post_patch: warning logged, kv_cache_dtype=auto, generation succeeds, total_blocks=1780
value: preserves task success rate on unsupported hardware (graceful degradation instead of crash)
